description: Regolith filter that generates itemAuxMap.generated.json with aux IDs for vanilla items, custom items, and custom blocks.

itemsUrl.description: URL to fetch vanilla item metadata from.

cacheMaxAgeHours.description: How long (in hours) to keep the cached vanilla items JSON before re-fetching.

outputPath.description: Output path for the generated JSON, relative to the Regolith temp directory.

blockBaseOffset.description: Offset added to |minVanillaId| to compute the custom block base ID. Increase by N if custom blocks render at wrong slots after loading a pack that registers additional blocks before yours.

shiftThreshold.description: First raw_id that may be displaced by developer-build items absent from the public API. Used to compute correctionBoundaryAux = (shiftThreshold + customItemCount) * 65536, which is embedded in the output JSON. The runtime adds extraCount * 65536 to all items with aux >= correctionBoundaryAux. Default 632 is the empirically-confirmed first affected raw_id.
